project_name: Clinical AI Safety Ops / Health AI Assurance Kit
one_sentence: A clinician built safety ops layer that helps inspect worst answers, missed escalation, missing clinical variables, source support, Turkish and English drift, transparency, and public claim hygiene before teams make claims about a medical AI system.
strategic_decision: Do not build another broad medical benchmark; build the safety, assurance, source support, and transparency layer around existing evaluation ecosystems.

lanes.name: Safety Gap Layer
lanes.purpose: Inspect worst answers, missed escalation, unsafe reassurance, missing clinical variables, and source support gaps.

lanes.name: Adapter Distribution Layer
lanes.purpose: Make the safety layer runnable where evaluators already work.

lanes.name: SourceCheckup Medical Layer
lanes.purpose: Separate source presence from exact medical claim support.

lanes.name: Turkish and Non English Drift Layer
lanes.purpose: Track Turkish clinical wording risk, meaning loss, escalation drift, and source support drift.

lanes.name: Transparency and Assurance Card Layer
lanes.purpose: Convert evaluation runs into readable evidence cards with limits, prompt set, model version, and review status.

lanes.name: Clinician Literacy Simulator
lanes.purpose: Turn synthetic failure cases into a short training and demo workflow.

lanes.name: Medical AI Safety Monitoring Layer
lanes.purpose: Track benchmark, governance, model release, and issue route changes for internal decision support.

phases.name: Product Spine
phases.build: Create a canonical roadmap, lane manifest, and local validation target for the full Health AI Assurance Kit.

phases.name: Safety Evidence Spine
phases.build: Create local leaderboard draft preview from promoted 30 prompt score files without changing the public leaderboard.

phases.name: Studio Product Mode
phases.build: Turn SafetyGuard Studio from local scorer into a guided product surface with sample mode, answer paste, and export links.

phases.name: SourceCheckup Medical CLI
phases.build: Produce a runnable medical claim support report from synthetic answers and optional source locators.

phases.name: Turkish Drift Preview
phases.build: Create a small Turkish and English drift dashboard with explicit validation tier labeling.

phases.name: Kit Level Assurance Card
phases.build: Generate one kit level assurance card that links safety gaps, source support, transparency, Turkish drift, and human review status.

phases.name: Clinician Literacy Demo
phases.build: Package the 20 minute synthetic demo into a reusable local lesson index.

phases.name: Monitoring Digest
phases.build: Create a manual digest schema before any automation loop is allowed.

phases.name: Start Here Proof Pack
phases.build: Create one local entry point that maps the roadmap, kit card, product surfaces, language drift, source support, demo, monitoring, and blocked gates.

phases.name: External Proof Route
phases.build: Open the first public proof route issue after explicit user approval, with further external actions kept behind separate review.

proof_pack_definition: Transparency card generated from a run
